nodes.label: Popup System and Settings UI Overhaul Design Specification
nodes.author: ui-ux-designer

nodes.label: Soft and Elevated Aesthetic Concept
nodes.author: ui-ux-designer
nodes.rationale: A visual style moving away from sharp borders toward macOS/iOS-like friendly design, using generous padding (32px), large border radii (24px outer, 16px inner), soft shadows, and card-based settings layouts to enhance user comfort and aesthetic appeal.
